diagrams.title: ANCOVA Model Structure
diagrams.description: Shows how ANCOVA combines ANOVA and regression: Y = μ + τ + β(X - X̄) + ε

diagrams.title: Homogeneity of Regression Slopes
diagrams.description: Three parallel regression lines showing equal slopes across treatment groups
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing the key assumption of parallel slopes

diagrams.title: SS Partitioning in ANCOVA
diagrams.description: Pie chart showing how Total SS is divided into components

diagrams.title: Adjusted vs Raw Means
diagrams.description: Comparison showing how adjusted means shift from raw means after covariate control
